description: root path collapses to the literal basename 'root'
basename with spaces and special chars is sanitized and collapsed
deep path uses only the final basename
trailing slash is normalized away; same id as the no-slash form
collision case A: nested /a/b. The 8-hex SHA-256 suffix of the full canonical path keeps this DISTINCT from the /a_b slug (which a naive slashes-to-underscores scheme would collide with)
collision case B: single segment /a_b. Distinct id from /a/b because the canonical path strings (and thus their hashes) differ; the basename also differs (a-b vs b)
